headline: Is Modine Still a Buy at 52-Week High or Should You Book Profits?
summary: MOD's surge to a 52-week high raises valuation concerns, but booming AI-driven cooling demand and rising margins suggest the rally may still have room to run.

raw.headline: Is Modine Still a Buy at 52-Week High or Should You Book Profits?
raw.summary: MOD's surge to a 52-week high raises valuation concerns, but booming AI-driven cooling demand and rising margins suggest the rally may still have room to run.

headline: Trane Technologies Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
summary: SWORDS, Ireland, April 09, 2026--Trane Technologies plc (NYSE:TT), a global climate innovator, will host a conference call to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 10 a.m. ET. The company will issue its first quarter earnings release and earnings presentation in advance of the call; both will be available on the Trane Technologies website.

headline: Trane Technologies' Q1 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: Trane Technologies is all set to release its fiscal first-quarter earnings soon, and analysts project a single-digit earnings growth.
